description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the golang:1.11 Docker image and defines two stages: build and test. Include a before_script that creates /go/src/gitlab.com/opennota and symlinks the repository into that path. In the build stage add a build job that runs `go build ./...`. In the test stage add a test job that runs `test -z "$(gofmt -l . | tee /dev/stderr)"` to verify no gofmt violations and then runs `go test ./...`. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined.
